gpy16_pair.rule: Built-in toolkit — g16 auto-discerns .py/.gpy; GrokVM in-tree; legacy GrokPy fallback last

notes: Grok16 1.0.0 — first stable release; g16 @ 16.1.1 with full battery gate
changelog: 1.0.0: Stable release — test-battery-release gate, linker -shared/-pie fix, profile/LTO/PGO hardening
1.0.0: G16 field linker — skip -pie on -shared links; atomic panel save under parallel ld
1.0.0: verify propagates linker/ironclad/rtx failures; expert tier labeled 1.0
0.9e: Track bump — built-in toolkits on main (GPY-16, ASM, all compilers); not tagged/released
0.9e: scripts/gpy-16 tracked launcher; languages install copies to prefix bin
0.9e: g16 unified driver — in-tree gpy-16 resolution before legacy sibling fallback
0.9d: Built-in GPY-16 toolkit — python/ tree, GrokVM auto-discern via g16
0.9d: grok16-toolkits.json — rebuilt compilers, binutils, ASM, all major language drivers in-tree
0.9d: Linker witness — 16 targets active; ironclad sanity linker doctrine checks
0.9d: field-cmake manifest — linker doctrine, orchestrator, mandate paths
0.9d: Binutils battery — incomplete JSON witness when g16-as/objdump not built
0.9c: Ironclad + field sanity meld wired through forge and CMake mandate
0.9c: G16 field linker — 16 targets, macOS/Android/ARM/x86, silicon mandate
0.9c: RTX gate — queen_rtx/vulkan_rtx blocked without RTX silicon
